name: Treasure Hunter
short_description: Treasure Hunter is a VR first-person adventure thriller game. Designed with the unique capabilities of virtual reality in mind, the game allows players to inhabit the spine-chilling world of Tresure Hunter and interact with terrifying devices.
detailed_description:
Treasure Hunter is a VR first-person adventure thriller game.
Explore mysterious locations, investigate fantastic devices, and discover treasures.
Designed with the unique capabilities of virtual reality in mind, the game allows players to inhabit the spine-chilling world of Tresure Hunter and interact with terrifying devices.
Become the protagonist of this fascinating world and escape from it.
about_the_game:
Treasure Hunter is a VR first-person adventure thriller game.
Explore mysterious locations, investigate fantastic devices, and discover treasures.
Designed with the unique capabilities of virtual reality in mind, the game allows players to inhabit the spine-chilling world of Tresure Hunter and interact with terrifying devices.
Become the protagonist of this fascinating world and escape from it.
supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Hindi, Italian, German, Dutch, Danish, Swedish, Japanese, Norwegian, Romanian, Bulgarian, Indonesian, Thai, Turkish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Polish, Finnish, Hungarian
